title: IBR - (Ice-boat racing)
description: Allows boats to go up-to 1 block steps, reduced velocity drop off while in the air and makes boats able to go through entities.
body:
# Ice Boat Racing
Made for spigot/paper or fabric servers (required server-side for full mod functionality)

## Boat step-height
Allows the boat driver to step up-to 1 blocks while moving which works completely client-side.

## Air resistence
Boat air resistence is reduced significantly to encourage boat jumps and so you don't lose all your speed while in-air. (Disable server flight checks/anti-cheats if experiencing issues)

## Boost/Bounce pads
- Magenta glazed terracotta -> Speed boost
- Blue glazed terracotta -> Bounce pad
- Light-blue glazed terracotta -> Bounce++ pad

### Enable/Disable Mod for clients
- To enable send "§f§e§e§a§n§m§v§f§f§e§o§m§n§o" 
- To disable send "§e§i§r§x§n§o§o§f§f§e§o§m§o§n" 
- *can be done using a plugin*

Additionally its enabled by default in singleplayer, for modded servers its enabled by default aswell IF the mod is on the server.
